articles.title: More Terra-Like Crashes? Ripple CEO Predicts There May Only Be Scores Of Cryptos Left In The Future
articles.description: Since the Terra ecosystem crash that rocked the crypto space last month, the spotlight of key industry players has remained on the viability of crypto projects.

articles.title: Large Bitcoin liquidations mean one man’s pain is another man’s pleasure — Time to buy the dip?
articles.description: Pro traders were forced to cut their losses after margin and futures markets became over-leveraged, creating a potential entry point for bullish buyers.

articles.title: Cardano: Ledger Starts Letting $ADA Investors Buy, Send and Receive Directly on Ledger Live
articles.description: French cryptocurrency hardware wallet manufacturer Ledger has finally added support for Cardano ($ADA) and is now letting users buy, send, and receive their tokens directly on Ledger Live, the application for managing cryptoassets on their devices. Paris-headquartered Ledger was co-founded in 2014 by Eric Larchevêque, Nicolas Bacca, Joel Pobeda, and Thomas France. It first announced it was...

articles.title: Price analysis 6/15: BTC, ETH, BNB, ADA, XRP, SOL, DOGE, DOT, LEO, SHIB
articles.description: BTC and select altcoins notched small gains after the Federal Reserve rolled out a 75 basis point rate hike, but technical analysis suggests that further downside is the most realistic outcome.

articles.title: Former NYSE president joins Uniswap Labs as advisor
articles.description: Uniswap Labs said that Cunningham was joining the team due to her belief in “the potential of decentralized exchange and in Uniswap Labs’s commitment to fairer markets.”

articles.title: Coinbase staff told to wait an hour to discover if they were fired
articles.description: According to an SEC filing, the cuts will leave Coinbase with around 5,000 remaining staff and will cost somewhere in the region of $40 million.

articles.title: Chainlink integrates with Moonbeam to provide price data to Polkadot developers
articles.description: Derek Yoo, the founder of Moonbeam, noted that the integration lets their platform provide “building blocks” to DeFi developers.

articles.title: SHIB tops the list of tokens Americans want to sell the most, study reveals
articles.description: Following the crypto market meltdown, most Americans are willing to offload several assets, with meme coin Shiba Inu (SHIB) ranking... Continue reading

articles.title: Tether Calms Fears Over Reserve Backing, Exposure to 3AC, Celsius
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer Tether has dismissed rumors concerning the heath of its commercial paper portfolio as completely false and likely spread to induce further panic. Tether Condemns False Backing Rumors...

articles.title: Tron’s USDD dips below 96 cents as stablecoin enters third day adrift
articles.description: The token dipped as low as $0.959 this morning before recovering to $0.974 at the time of writing.

articles.title: Instutional Investors Boost Allocation to Cardano and XRP Amid Price Weakness
articles.description: The CoinShares' Digital Asset Monthly Fund Manager Survey has revealed that investors are increasing their digital asset allocations to Cardano, XRP, and Polkadot at the expense of Ethereum.

articles.title: Tether aims to decrease commercial paper backing of USDT to zero
articles.description: Tether expects to reduce USDT’s commercial paper backing to $8.4 billion by the end of June 2022 and eventually completely remove it.

articles.title: Cardano: Ledger Live Finally Adds Support for ADA After Months of Waiting
articles.description: Cardano has now arrived at Ledger Live after months of waiting

articles.title: Tron DAO Reserve pulls 2.5 billion TRX from Binance as USDD slips further from peg
articles.description: The move could shrink liquidity for tron (TRX) shorts on Binance as the reserve seeks to prop up USDD's dollar peg.
